query: SELECT id, listingId, listtracViews, listtracInquiries, listtracShares, listtracFavorites, listtracVTourViews, dateRangeStart, dateRangeEnd, weekOf FROM weekly_stats WHERE listingId = 1 ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
